features: CLASSIC DESIGN: The vintage style and strong stylish carrying handle has a nostalgic feel, yet still features the modern essentials such as MP3 playback and MusicStream connection. The wood effect and silver colouring offers a fully-functional retro decoration to add to your home

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all ages to enjoy. Tune in to your favourite AM and FM stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies and press each button for pause, next song, previous song and play when using MP3 tunes.

RECHARGEABLE: Compact and fully rechargeable, this MusicStream radio speaker is an ideal accessory for the kitchen, dining room, conservatory or even to be carried out in to the garden. Simply plug-in to the mains to charge for 8 hours approx. playtime, use while plugged in to the mains or alternatively power with 2x D alkaline batteries (batteries not included).

MP3 PLAYBACK AND MUSICSTREAM: As well as use of the radio channels, the vintage style radio can be connected to your phone or tablet device via MusicStream and used as a speaker to play all your favourite songs wirelessly. Alternatively, you can play MP3 song files through the radio speakers via USB or micro SD card.

PORTABLE: With a full charge or batteries inserted, the vintage style MusicStream radio is small and light enough to carry with you, making it ideal for garden parties, camping trips and travelling. Full charge will play for approx. 8 hours.
description: From the manufacturer This radio features both FM and AM frequencies, allowing you to access a wide range of radio stations for music, news, and entertainment. With the ability to tune into both AM and FM signals, this radio provides versatile listening options to suit your preferences. In addition to traditional radio listening, this AM/FM device also allows you to play MP3 files and stream music from your favourite services via USB or Micro SD card. Connect to your preferred services and enjoy your choice in your way. This radio features built-in rechargeable batteries, providing the convenience of wireless listening without the need for disposable batteries. With the ability to be easily recharged via USB or a power outlet, this radio is perfect for on-the-go use The radio with music stream feature is the perfect device for those who love to immerse themselves in music. With this feature, you can easily connect your smartphone to stream and play music through the radio's quality speakers and enjoy a seamless listening experience. All your audio needs packed in a gift box! This retro-style radio comes packaged in a beautifully designed gift box, making it the perfect present for any music lover or collector. This retro-style radio comes packaged in a beautifully designed gift box, making it the perfect present for any music lover or collector. With a classic look reminiscent of the golden age of radio, it features modern technology including FM/AM frequencies and MP3 music streaming.
